reasoning: The control SI-4-c focuses on invoking internal monitoring capabilities. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to enabling audit logging to monitor API server interactions and ensuring retention policies are configured. Additionally, admission controllers can enforce security policies that contribute to monitoring and controlling the cluster's state. NetworkPolicies can be configured to monitor and control network traffic, ensuring only authorized communication paths are used. These functions collectively support the internal monitoring capabilities required by the control.
